---
title: "MPA_infrastructure_overlap"
author: "Caitie"
date: "2025-09-22"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

```{r}
library(terra)
library(sf)
library(tidyverse)
library(here)
library(exactextractr)
```

# Prep MPAs

Downloaded Sept 22 2025. This has already been cleaned using the wdapr package. It has been filter as follows:

coi2<-c("RUS","BRA","FIN","FRA","GBR","BEL","CAN","ESP","DEU","DNK","IRL","SWE","NLD","NOR","GRC","ITA","POL","PRT" ,"TWN", "TUR" ,"TON", "USA" ,"VNM" ,"CHN" ,"ARE" ,"JPN" ,"NAM" ,"NFK", "CHL", "LKA", "KOR")

filter(ISO3 %in% coi2,
         MARINE %in% c(1,2),
         STATUS %in% c("Designated", "Inscribed", "Established")) %>% 

```{r}
mpa<-st_read(here("raw_data/WDPA/Subset_WDPA_Sept2025.shp")) %>% 
    st_transform(., crs = "ESRI:54017")
```

# EEZ intersect

```{r}
eez<-st_read(here("raw_data/EEZ/eez_simple.shp")) %>% 
   st_make_valid(.) %>% 
  st_transform(., crs = "ESRI:54017")
```

```{r}
eez_mpa<-st_intersection(eez,mpa) %>% 
  mutate(mpa_km2 = as.numeric(st_area(.)*1e-6))

eez_mpa<-eez_mpa %>%
  select(rgn_key, area_km2, mpa_km2)

test<-eez_mpa %>% 
  filter(rgn_key == "BEL")
```

```{r}
st_write(eez_mpa, here("output_data/MPA_EEZ_intersect.shp"), overwrite = T)

```

# Infrastructure data
```{r}
wind_points<-st_read(here("output_data/Wind_point_locations.shp"))
wind25<-st_read(here("output_data/Wind_buffer_25km.shp"))

wind15<-st_read(here("output_data/Wind_buffer_15km.shp"))

wind1<-st_read(here("output_data/Wind_buffer_1km.shp"))
```


# Infrastructure intersect

Number of infrastructure
```{r}
mpa_num_wind<-st_intersection(eez_mpa, wind_points)

mpa_wind_count<-mpa_num_wind %>% 
  distinct(geometry, .keep_all = TRUE) %>% 
  mutate(count = 1) %>%
  group_by(rgn_key) %>% 
  summarise(num_wind = sum(count, na.rm = T)) %>% 
  mutate(type = "MPA") %>% 
  as.data.frame() %>% 
  select(-geometry)
```

```{r}
write.csv(mpa_wind_count, here("output_data/MPA_wind_count.csv"))
```


Area for buffers

```{r}
mpa_wind25<-st_intersection(eez_mpa, wind25) %>% 
  mutate(int_km2 = as.numeric(st_area(.)*1e-6),
         buff = 25) %>% 
  select(-diss)
```

```{r}
mpa_wind15<-st_intersection(eez_mpa, wind15) %>% 
  mutate(int_km2 = as.numeric(st_area(.)*1e-6),
         buff = 15) %>% 
  select(-diss)
```

```{r}
mpa_wind1<-st_intersection(eez_mpa, wind1) %>% 
  mutate(int_km2 = as.numeric(st_area(.)*1e-6),
         buff = 1) %>% 
  select(-diss)
```

```{r}
all_buff<-rbind(mpa_wind25, mpa_wind15, mpa_wind1) %>% 
  mutate(prop_int = int_km2/mpa_km2,
         type = "MPA") %>% 
  as.data.frame() %>% 
  select(-geometry)
```

```{r}
write.csv(all_buff, here("output_data/MPA_wind_area.csv"))
```
